purpose: Germany adjacent-market competitor and proxy domain seeds for remaining scorecard gaps
notes: Do not mix these domains with DE cross-border Luxembourg-intent keyword captures.
Priority should follow B1 -> B2 -> B3.
Luxembourg domains are intentionally excluded from this strict DE-only pack.
